title: Exact Rational LRA Witnesses

solver_reuse.target: fixed rational order QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact rational order conflicts for trichotomy branches over 1/4 and 3/4 plus a transitivity violation over 1/5 < 2/5 < 3/5.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional rational-order rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep general ordered-field and completeness theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode each fixed rational check as QF_LRA.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep fixed rational order refutations on Axeyum's checked Farkas evidence path.
Extend from fixed examples to a small generated rational corpus.
